title: BARBARA MAHER APARTMENTS - 211info
text: TRANSITION PROJECTS BARBARA MAHER APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 32 unit sober residential housing program. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals age 18 and older who identify as female, experiencing homelessness, and are in recovery from substance use disorder issues. Individuals must be alcohol and drug-free before entry. Hours: Residential Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 280-4700 Main phone Main phone (503) 280-4700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to submit a Permanent Supportive Housing Pre-Screening Form, call, or walk in to the Resource Center at 650 NW Irving Street, Portland, OR 97209 -Average wait times can be a few months. To remain on the waitlist, people must check in once a week. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Tuberculosis (TB) card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Two blocks northwest of Union Station. On theTriMet MAX Yellow and Green lines. Services: Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing * Homeless Women Single Room Occupancy Housing * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - IDENTIFICATION ASSISTANCE GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - MEDICAL CLINIC HOUSING/SHELTER - ARGYLE GARDENS HOUSING/SHELTER - CLARK CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - DOREEN'S PLACE HOUSING/SHELTER - JEAN'S PLACE HOUSING/SHELTER - RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION - TRIMET TICKETS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
